ast.name: appendText
ast.source: You forward selected emails to a special TaskRobin email address
ast.target: 您将选定的电子邮件转发到一个特殊的TaskRobin电子邮件地址

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: TaskRobin securely processes these emails and their attachments
ast.target: TaskRobin安全地处理这些电子邮件及其附件

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: The emails are converted to markdown and saved in your vault when you sync your emails
ast.target: 当您同步电子邮件时，这些邮件将被转换为Markdown格式并保存在您的保险库中

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Click the TaskRobin icon in the left sidebar to set up your email sync
ast.target: 点击左侧边栏中的TaskRobin图标以设置您的电子邮件同步

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Configure advanced options in the plugin settings
ast.target: 在插件设置中配置高级选项

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Use the command palette to access TaskRobin features
ast.target: 使用命令面板访问TaskRobin功能

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: for pricing details and more information.
ast.target: 了解定价详情和更多信息。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show me basic information about this plugin and how to make the best out of Sync Email by TaskRobin.
ast.target: 显示有关此插件的基本信息，以及如何充分利用TaskRobin的同步电子邮件功能。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Complete the setup process to start syncing emails to your Obsidian vault. TaskRobin helps you sync your emails to Obsidian through email forwarding. Complete the setup to get started.
ast.target: 完成设置过程以开始将电子邮件同步到您的Obsidian保险库。TaskRobin通过电子邮件转发帮助您将邮件同步到Obsidian。完成设置即可开始使用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This email address will be pre-filled when creating new integrations. You can change it for each integration.
ast.target: 创建新集成时，此电子邮件地址将被预填充。您可以为每个集成更改它。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The default folder where email content will be saved for new integrations. You can change the email destination folder when you create new integrations.
ast.target: 新集成的默认电子邮件内容保存文件夹。您可以在创建新集成时更改电子邮件的目标文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, email attachments will be downloaded and saved in the vault
ast.target: 启用后，电子邮件附件将被下载并保存在保险库中

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, emails will be automatically synced when Obsidian starts
ast.target: 启用后，Obsidian启动时将自动同步电子邮件

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Default email address for new integrations
ast.target: 新集成的默认电子邮件地址

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 默认保险库电子邮件文件夹

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Please enter a valid email address.
ast.target: 请输入有效的电子邮件地址。

ast.name: setText
ast.target: 电子邮件地址为必填项

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Only letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores are allowed
ast.target: 仅允许使用字母、数字、连字符和下划线

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to sync. Check console for details.
ast.target: 同步失败。请检查控制台了解详情。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forwarding email address copied to clipboard!
ast.target: 转发电子邮件地址已复制到剪贴板！

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 复制电子邮件地址失败

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Folder does not exist yet. It will be created when syncing.
ast.target: 文件夹尚不存在。同步时将自动创建。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to delete integration. Check console for details.
ast.target: 删除集成失败。请检查控制台了解详情。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to create integration. Please check your network connection and try again.
ast.target: 创建集成失败。请检查您的网络连接并重试。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please fill in all required fields correctly.
ast.target: 请正确填写所有必填字段。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to save settings. Please try again.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please enter a valid email address
ast.target: 请输入有效的电子邮件地址

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forwarding alias can only contain letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores
ast.target: 转发别名只能包含字母、数字、连字符和下划线

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error creating directory. Check console for details.
ast.target: 创建目录时出错。请检查控制台获取详细信息。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Create a readme note about this plugin
ast.target: 为此插件创建一个自述说明

ast.name: text
ast.source: Welcome to Sync Email by TaskRobin
ast.target: 欢迎使用 TaskRobin 的邮件同步功能

ast.name: text
ast.source: Thank you for installing Sync Email by TaskRobin for Obsidian! This plugin helps you maintain a searchable archive of important emails directly within your Obsidian workspace.
ast.target: 感谢您安装 TaskRobin 为 Obsidian 开发的邮件同步插件！此插件可帮助您在 Obsidian 工作区内直接维护一个可搜索的重要邮件存档。

ast.name: text
ast.source: TaskRobin offers a 7-day free trial for all new users
ast.target: TaskRobin 为所有新用户提供 7 天免费试用

ast.name: text
ast.source: No payment information required during the trial
ast.target: 试用期间无需提供支付信息

ast.name: text
ast.source: Subscription plans start at $2.49/month after the trial period
ast.target: 试用期结束后，订阅计划起价为每月 2.49 美元

ast.name: text
ast.source: Warning: Directory does not exist. It will be created when syncing.
ast.target: 警告：目录不存在。同步时将自动创建。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 使用 TaskRobin 同步邮件

ast.name: text
ast.source: Send emails from your email inbox to the TaskRobin forwarding addresses below, then sync these emails to the respective Obsidian vault folders.
ast.target: 将您收件箱中的邮件发送到下方的 TaskRobin 转发地址，然后将这些邮件同步到 Obsidian 库的相应文件夹中。

ast.name: text
ast.source: TaskRobin syncs and integrates emails from any email provider to Obsidian, Notion, Airtable and Google Drive.
ast.target: TaskRobin 可将任何邮件提供商的邮件同步并集成到 Obsidian、Notion、Airtable 和 Google Drive。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 访问 TaskRobin.io 了解更多信息

ast.name: text
ast.source: TaskRobin helps you sync your emails to Obsidian through email forwarding. Here's how it works:
ast.target: TaskRobin 通过邮件转发帮助您将邮件同步到 Obsidian。其工作原理如下：

ast.name: text
ast.source: 1. Enter your email address that you'll forward emails from
ast.target: 1. 输入您将用于转发邮件的电子邮件地址

ast.name: text
ast.source: 2. Create a TaskRobin forwarding address that will receive your emails
ast.target: 2. 创建一个用于接收邮件的 TaskRobin 转发地址

ast.name: text
ast.source: 3. Choose where to save your emails in Obsidian
ast.target: 3. 选择在 Obsidian 中保存邮件的位置

ast.name: text
ast.source: Email address to sync emails from:
ast.target: 要同步邮件的电子邮件地址：

ast.name: text
ast.source: You can use different email addresses for different integrations
ast.target: 您可以为不同的集成使用不同的电子邮件地址

ast.name: text
ast.source: Where should emails be saved in the vault?
ast.target: 邮件应保存在库中的哪个位置？

ast.name: text
ast.source: Folder will be created if it doesn't exist
ast.target: 如果文件夹不存在，将自动创建

ast.name: text
ast.target: 为每封邮件创建子文件夹（默认）

ast.name: text
ast.source: Email markdown files in the base email folder, attachments in sub-folders per email
ast.target: 邮件 Markdown 文件存放在基础邮件文件夹中，附件按邮件分存于子文件夹

ast.name: text
ast.source: Choose how emails and attachments are organized in your vault
ast.target: 选择邮件和附件在您库中的组织方式

ast.name: text
ast.source: After setting up forwarding, emails sent to your TaskRobin address can be synced to your Obsidian vault.
ast.target: 设置转发后，发送到您 TaskRobin 地址的邮件即可同步到您的 Obsidian 库。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Please note that TaskRobin is a paid service. 7-day free trial is available to all new users. Paid plan starts at $2.49/month.
ast.target: 请注意，TaskRobin 是一项付费服务。所有新用户均可享受 7 天免费试用。付费计划起价为每月 2.49 美元。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The following email addresses have added with authentication tokens:
ast.target: 以下电子邮件地址已添加认证令牌：
